title: EzFly
description: EzFly is a plugin that lets the player fly with the right permissons.
body:
# **_Q: Why should I use this plugin and what does it do_**

A: This is a plugin that lets the player fly in survival mode with the right permissons.

# **_Q: How do I manage the permissions_**

A: Use a rank system like [luckperms](https://luckperms.net/).

# **_Q: How do I Fly_**

A: Use /fly. If you are a player and have the right permisson (ezfly.fly) it will send you a message and lets you fly.

# **_Q: Is this open source_**

A: [yes](https://buymeacoffee.com/Polokalap). You can see the code [here](https://github.com/Polokalap/EzFly).
